import unreal
eal = unreal.EditorAssetLibrary
for p in ("/Game/Character/A_Walk","/Game/Character/T_ClassD_Paint","/Game/Character/M_ClassD"):
    print(p, eal.does_asset_exist(p))
S = unreal.AnimSequenceService
try:
    poses = S.get_pose_at_time("/Game/Character/A_Walk", 0.0, True)
    zs = [pp.transform.translation.z for pp in poses]
    print("A_Walk height cm:", round(max(zs)-min(zs),1))
except Exception as e:
    print("pose err:", e)
